sourcesContent:
// src/components/pleadings/NtaTemplates.jsx import React from 'react'; const NtaTemplates = () => { return (

NTA Response Templates

Templates for responding to Notice to Appear

Defective NTA Responses:

  • Line 1: "Denies proper service of the Notice to Appear based on a defective NTA."
  • Line 3: "Denies all allegations based on a defective NTA."
  • Line 4: "Denies removability based on a defective NTA."

Valid NTA Responses:

  • Line 1: "Concedes proper service."
  • Line 3: Refer to specific allegations
  • Line 4: "Concedes removability."
); }; export default NtaTemplates;
